component.name: FetchFilesTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "fetchFiles" end sub
sub fetchFiles() url = getServerUrl() + "/objects/" + urlEncodePath(m.top.path) if Right(url, 1) <> "/" then url = url + "/" transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") transfer.SetUrl(url) transfer.AddHeader("Authorization", "Bearer " + getApiKey())
response = transfer.GetToString() if response = invalid or response = "" m.top.status = "error" return end if
data = ParseJson(response) if data = invalid m.top.status = "error" return end if
dirs = [] files = []
for each item in data parts = item.path.Split("/") name = parts[parts.Count() - 1] sf = "" if item.streamFormat <> invalid then sf = item.streamFormat
iconUri = "pkg:/images/icon_file.png" if item.type = "directory" iconUri = "pkg:/images/icon_folder.png" else if sf = "mp4" or sf = "mkv" or sf = "hls" or sf = "dash" iconUri = "pkg:/images/icon_video.png" else if sf = "mp3" or sf = "mka" or sf = "mks" iconUri = "pkg:/images/icon_audio.png" end if
entry = { name: name, path: item.path, url: getServerUrl() + "/objects/" + urlEncodePath(item.path), type: item.type, streamFormat: sf, iconUri: iconUri }
if item.type = "directory" dirs.Push(entry) else files.Push(entry) end if end for
dirs = insertionSortByName(dirs) files = insertionSortByName(files)
result = [] for each d in dirs result.Push(d) end for for each f in files result.Push(f) end for
m.top.entries = result m.top.status = "done" end sub
function insertionSortByName(arr as Object) as Object n = arr.Count() for i = 1 to n - 1 key = arr[i] j = i - 1 while j >= 0 and LCase(arr[j].name) > LCase(key.name) arr[j + 1] = arr[j] j = j - 1 end while arr[j + 1] = key end for return arr end function
